title: Common Pitfalls in Individual Compensation Using Grants — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-05-07 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Common Pitfalls in Individual Compensation Using Grants', presented by Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD, CRA, CPRA, CFRA) and Ryan Mobley (CRA, CFRA, CPRA). Covers common compliance pitfalls in compensating individuals from grant funds, including summer pay, extra compensation, and overload restrictions. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/8AGKiNatq0t6v7zOrReSrReFUbdiBHBIr4Xx5eQmJHy1zwx2SFnmElOxqDI2bV5P.kdNcJ51sZmIkx36N
